name: Dangle
author: Poki
description: Dangle is an physics-based action game in which you have to help a little spider get to the bottom of the levels! By swinging the spider back and forward, you can change its direction. Be careful however! If you run into enemies, your spider will get hurt. Lose all hearts and its game over. Can you get the spider to safety in all levels? How to play Dangle? Left-click to lower the spider! Right-click to raise the spider! Move the mouse to swing the spider around! Who created Dangle? Dangle was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: The Bucket , Chick Flick and Double Edged How can I play Dangle for free? You can play Dangle for free on Poki. Can I play Dangle on mobile devices and desktop? Dangle can be played on your computer.
